title: Buffalo Wings sa Bahay
description: Prito lang ang chicken, buhos ng Buffalo Sauce, then toss. Boom, restaurant-level wings na! Perfect pang-pulutan.
steps: Fry chicken wings until golden and crispy.
Drain excess oil.
Toss hot wings in Buffalo Sauce until evenly coated.
Serve with celery sticks and rice.

title: Teriyaki Rice Bowl Business
description: Start a rice bowl food stall gamit ang Teriyaki Sauce. 1 bottle = 40+ servings. Compute: P90 / 40 = P2.25 per serving lang sa sauce!
steps: Pan-fry chicken slices until cooked through.
Pour Teriyaki Sauce and toss to coat.
Serve over steamed rice.
Top with sesame seeds and spring onions.

title: Sweet Chili Party Platter
description: Fry up nuggets, mojos, at lumpia — then serve with Sweet Chili as dipping sauce. P85 lang for the whole barkada session!
ingredients: 3 tbsp Kusinamate Sweet Chili for dipping
steps: Fry nuggets, mojos, and lumpia until crispy.
Arrange on a large platter.
Serve Kusinamate Sweet Chili in a bowl for dipping.
Gather the barkada and enjoy!

title: Honey Sriracha Glazed Porkchop
description: Boring porkchop? Hindi na! Honey Sriracha glaze turns your everyday pork into something special. Sweet, spicy, sticky perfection.
steps: Season pork chops with salt, pepper, and garlic.
Pan-fry until golden on both sides.
Pour Honey Sriracha sauce and let it glaze, flipping once.
Serve with rice and atchara.

title: Soy Garlic Sinangag
description: Level up your sinangag game! Mix Soy Garlic sauce into your garlic fried rice for that addicting umami flavor. Perfect with any -silog combo.
steps: Heat oil, saute garlic until golden.
Add day-old rice and stir-fry on high heat.
Drizzle Soy Garlic sauce and toss until evenly mixed.
Serve with your favorite -silog ulam.

title: Hickory BBQ Pork Ribs
description: Fall-off-the-bone BBQ ribs na hindi kailangan ng smoker. Boil, bake, glaze — done! Pang-handaan level na ulam.
steps: Boil ribs in salted water for 30 min until tender.
Drain and arrange on baking tray.
Brush generously with Hickory BBQ sauce.
Bake at 200°C for 15 min or grill until caramelized.
